item.title: PiXARGUS Optimizes Inline Plastic Profile Inspection with ProfilControl 7 PlastX
item.description: By adapting its proven ProfilControl 7 technology specifically to the needs of plastics processing, the company delivers a system that balances high performance with cost efficiency—qualities that make it particularly well suited to the window construction industry.

item.title: ZEISS and Verus Metrology Partner to Advance Metrology Automation
item.description: Automation continues to reshape the manufacturing landscape, placing increasing demands on metrology systems to deliver faster, more reliable, and seamlessly integrated measurement processes.

item.title: GiantEye Project Aims to Transform Large-Scale Industrial CT Inspection
item.description: The ability to look inside complex components without cutting them open or dismantling them lies at the heart of nondestructive testing (NDT).

item.title: Measur3D Simplifies Shop Floor 3D Measurements
item.description: This growing gap between production capability and inspection practicality has created a clear demand for measurement systems that combine the power of 3D inspection with the simplicity and affordability required for everyday shop-floor use.

item.title: Why U.S. Businesses Are Reconsidering Section 301 Tariff Refunds
item.description: U.S. machine vision integrators and automation companies are revisiting Section 301 tariff refunds due to ongoing supply chain pressures.

item.title: Visions: A Machine Vision and Automation Solutions Podcast, Part 2
item.description: An AI vision system replaces manual pallet checks at Shaw Industries, demonstrating a turnkey solution for loading dock verification and automated quality control.

item.title: AI-Powered Industrial Camera Platform Made for High-Speed Diagnostics
item.description: The camera is designed to achieve a frame rate of up to 1,400 fps in full resolution and up to 29,000 fps at reduced resolution.
